summary: This document outlines the company's mission, leadership team, and product strategy for an AI-powered phone agent service targeting UK GP practices. It details the problem statement regarding GP capacity, the technical infrastructure of the AI intake system, and market segmentation within the NHS ecosystem. The content also highlights current milestones, including self-funded status and interest from London medical centers.
